content.problemStatement:
You are given a tree rooted at node 111 with NNN vertices. The iiiththth vertex initially has value Ai(1‚â§i‚â§N)A_i (1 \leq i \leq N)Ai‚Äã(1‚â§i‚â§N). You are also given QQQ queries.

In each query you are given a vertex VVV.  Let S={S1,S2,...Sx}S = \{ S_1 , S_2 , ... S_x \} S={S1‚Äã,S2‚Äã,...Sx‚Äã} denote the set of vertices such that SiS_iSi‚Äã is in the subtree of VVV, distance between SiS_iSi‚Äã and VVV is even and Si‚âÝVS_i \neq VSi‚ÄãÓÄÝ=V for all iii. For all SiS_iSi‚Äã , add AAASiS_iSi‚Äã to AVA_VAV‚Äã and change the value of AAASiS_iSi‚Äã to zero.

Find the values of all the vertices after all queries are performed.

**Note**-The distance between two vertices is defined as the number of edges
traversed on the shortest path from one vertex to the other.

Input:
The first line contains an integer TTT denoting the number of test cases.
The first line of each test case contain two integers NNN and QQQ.
The second line contains NNN space separated integers, A1,A2,...,AnA_1, A_2, ..., A_nA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,...,An‚Äã denoting the initial values of the vertices.
The next N‚àí1N-1N‚àí1 lines contain two integers uuu and vvv denoting an edge between uuuand vvv.
The next QQQ lines contain a single integer which is the query.
Output:
Print a single line containing NNN integers for each test case which is the final values of the vertices.
###Constraints:


1‚â§T‚â§101\leq T \leq 101‚â§T‚â§10
1‚â§N‚â§2000001 \leq N \leq 2000001‚â§N‚â§200000
1‚â§Q‚â§2000001 \leq Q \leq 2000001‚â§Q‚â§200000
0‚â§Ai‚â§1090 \leq A_i \leq 10^90‚â§Ai‚Äã‚â§109
The sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 200000200000200000.
The sum of QQQ over all test cases does not exceed 200000200000200000.
###Sample Input
1
4 3
6 2 7 3
1 2
2 3
3 4
3
2
1

###Sample Output
13 5 0 0

###Explanation

Node 333 has no child in its subtree which is at  an even distance so there is no change in the values. Values of nodes after 1st1st1st query: 6,2,7,36, 2, 7, 36,2,7,3.

Node 444 is at an even distance in the subtree of node 222 so A4A_4A4‚Äã gets added to A2A_2A2‚Äã and A4A_4A4‚Äã becomes 0. Values of nodes after 2nd2nd2nd query: 6,5,7,06, 5, 7, 06,5,7,0.

Node 333 is at an even distance in the subtree of node 111 so A3A_3A3‚Äã gets added to A1A_1A1‚Äã and A3A_3A3‚Äã becomes 0. Values of nodes after 3rd3rd3rd query: 13,5,0,013, 5, 0, 013,5,0,0.
